rootCause: Quest dialogue completable validation treated any option with a goto field as navigable, even when the option type was process. At runtime, only goto options advance dialogue state, so nodes with only process options became dead-ends and slipped through tests.
resolution: Updated quest dialogue validation to only treat type=goto options as dialogue transitions, added a regression test for process-only nodes with goto metadata, and added explicit goto dialogue options to all affected quests so each non-terminal node has a valid navigation path.
